label: statistic
definition: A quantitative measurement or percentage derived from survey data or benchmark analysis

label: key-performance-indicator
definition: A named metric used to evaluate organizational performance against benchmarks

label: survey-finding
definition: A finding or data point derived from primary survey research

label: prediction
definition: A forward-looking forecast or projection about future trends or adoption rates

label: ranking
definition: An ordered comparison or prioritized list of items by measured criteria

label: expert-opinion
definition: An interpretive or analytical statement by the study author or research team

label: market-data
definition: Quantitative data about market size, scope, or industry participation

label: framework
definition: A conceptual model, research framework, or analytical classification scheme

label: technology-assessment
definition: An evaluation of a technology's maturity, adoption, or strategic positioning

label: benchmarking
definition: Comparative analysis against defined performance standards or peer groups

label: survey-research
definition: Primary data collection through structured questionnaires or polls

label: industry-analysis
definition: Secondary analysis of market trends, competitive dynamics, and industry structure

label: qualitative-research
definition: Interviews, focus groups, or case study methodology

label: high
definition: Strong evidentiary support from explicit data in the source; directly stated

label: medium
definition: Reasonable inference from source material; indirectly supported or partially stated

label: low
definition: Weak inference; extrapolated from limited or ambiguous source data

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative or time-based measurement from testing; a specific metric value obtained through direct measurement or structured evaluation

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Observation records an analyst judgment, interpretation, or recommendation that goes beyond raw data to offer evaluative conclusions

label: Framework Factor
definition: A component or variable within an analytical framework or model used to structure the analysis; a dimension of a multi-factor evaluation scheme

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative or qualitative data point about market size, pricing, cost structures, or commercial dynamics derived from research

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Empirical evaluation of a specific technology product or system based on hands-on testing, performance measurement, or documented behavior

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Observation is a forward-looking prediction about future market conditions, technology adoption, or business outcomes made at time of study
